comments.author: @Guo-r6y
comments.text: 四川大凉山，很多中国人都不喜欢那里的人

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: 谢谢你的评论。我的视频旨在展示这些社区的独特生活，希望它能帮助大家更好地理解他们。

comments.author: @TRUEEARTH4k
comments.text: High above the clouds in remote parts of China, entire villages survive on the edges of massive cliffs and dangerous mountains. In places where children once climbed fragile ladders to reach school and roads barely exist, daily life becomes a constant battle between isolation, nature, and survival.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Your description perfectly captures the breathtaking reality and the immense difficulties faced by the people living in these remote regions. 🙏

comments.author: @ATLAS_UNBOUND_26
comments.text: Remarkable documentary. The cinematography beautifully captures the resilience and cultural heritage of these mountain communities. Truly eye-opening content — well done to the entire production team.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you so much for the kind words, I'm thrilled you enjoyed the documentary! 😊

comments.author: @Sebastianah-h7r
comments.text:
i’ve been watching your content and I wanted to say that I think your channel has a lot more potential than you may realize.
One thing I’ve noticed about YouTube is that many creators already have the talent and work ethic needed to grow, but they still face obstacles that slow things down—whether it’s lower click-through rates, audience drop-off, inconsistent recommendations, or difficulty converting viewers into subscribers.
These challenges can make growth feel unpredictable, even when the content is genuinely valuable.
That’s why I decided to reach out.
While going through your videos, I came up with an idea that I think could help you overcome some of these obstacles and unlock stronger performance. It’s a practical concept you can test without changing what makes your content unique.
I’m not selling anything. I just think the idea is worth sharing because your channel already has a solid foundation.
If you’d like to hear it, I’d be happy to explain.
Are you in?

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you so much, I'm really glad you enjoyed the tour! 😊

comments.author: @RealworldTravel-g5l
comments.text: They literally built all those houses on the peak of a mountain. How crazy.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: It’s truly incredible what they were able to construct in such a challenging environment! 🏔️

comments.author: @josephhughes3313
comments.text: Risking your life everyday not for me

comments.author: @InsidetheMystery88
comments.text: This video shows a very different side of China, completely opposite to the modern urban image we often see. I wonder if life here is changing due to tourism or still remains the same?

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: That’s a great question, and it's fascinating to see how these remote communities are balancing tradition with the growing interest from travelers.
